name: Strawberry Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and half of the confectioners sugar.
2. Add butter and mix until crumbly. Pat into a buttered 10-inch pizza pan. Bake at 400°F for 8-10 minutes, or until light brown. Set aside to cool.
3. Whip cream and set aside.
4. Blend cream cheese, remaining confectioners sugar, and vanilla extract. Fold into whipped cream.
5. Spread the cream mixture on the cooled crust and chill.
6. Cut and mash a quarter of the strawberries. Mix with water and gelatin. Spread over the chilled crust and cream center. Place the remaining strawberries upright on top. Chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
